title: IT Helpdesk Engineer (Contract, Central & East side, basic up to 4k) #IRT
description:
We are hiring under Recruit Express headcount and details of this position are:

Job Title: IT Helpdesk Engineer

Location: Central & East, Singapore

Job Responsibilities:

  • IDs Administration: Manage and maintain user IDs, ensuring proper access and security protocols are followed.
  • Role-based Quota Control: Monitor and adjust user quotas based on role requirements and organizational policies.
  • Librarian Tasks: Organize and manage IT-related documentation and resources for easy access and retrieval.
  • Pin Mailer Access Logs Checks: Regularly review and verify access logs to ensure compliance with security standards.
  • Document Filing: Maintain accurate and organized filing systems for IT documents and records.
  • USB and Device Control: Monitor and control the use of USB and other external devices to prevent unauthorized data transfer.
  • Incident Reporting: Document and report IT incidents, ensuring timely resolution and communication with relevant stakeholders.

Monthly Tasks:

  • Monthly Reports: Prepare and distribute monthly reports on IT activities, incidents, and performance metrics.
  • System Maintenance/Release Logs: Maintain logs of system maintenance activities and software releases.
  • Server Maintenance: Perform routine maintenance on servers to ensure optimal performance and uptime.

Bi-annual & Annual Tasks:

  • Hardware and Software Check: Conduct comprehensive checks of hardware and software to ensure they are up-to-date and functioning correctly.

Yearly Tasks:

  • System Maintenance: Perform annual system maintenance to ensure long-term reliability and efficiency.
  • Power Shutdown/Up: Coordinate and manage power shutdowns and startups as required for maintenance or emergencies.

Ad-hoc Tasks:

  • System Release
  • Project Support
  • Other assignments


Requirements:

  • Experience in IT helpdesk or relevant field
  • Basic knowledge on programming or system analysis
  • Individuals who are punctual, responsible and good communication/ interpersonal skills
  • Person with eye for details and proactive problem solver (ability in fast processing)
  • Good documentation skills
  • Must be independent, proactive and self-motivated
  • Matured & customer-centric individuals

Interested applicants please send your resume to rita@recruitexpress.com.sg and look for:

Rita Shi Tianhe

Outsourcing Team

Recruit Express Pte Ltd

EA License No: 99C4599

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
